creator: hcoyote@ghostar.org
text:
I was looking at old PRs today and noticed that this is still
open.  This appears to have been fixed back in v1.5 of
src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/pod/pod/Makefile and MFC'd back to 1.2.2.3 so
the PR can probably be closed.


Travis
